PreCommit.command: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | grep -v 'e2e/' | grep -v 'Cannot find module' | grep -v 'JSX element implicitly' | grep -v 'Cannot find namespace' | grep -v "module path 'react/jsx-runtime'" | grep -v "Parameter.*implicitly has an 'any'" | grep -v "Cannot find name 'process'" | grep -v 'TS2322.*key.*string' | head -5
PreCommit.description: Type-check before commit — catches real errors while filtering pre-existing env-level issues
